name: Eldritch Spear

spell.entry: a Warlock Cantrip That Deals Damage

entries: Choose one of your known {@filter Warlock cantrips|spells|level=0|class=Warlock|damage type=acid;bludgeoning;cold;fire;force;lightning;necrotic;piercing;poison;psychic;radiant;slashing;thunder|range=point} that deals damage and has a range of 10+ feet. When you cast that spell, its range increases by a number of feet equal to 30 times your Warlock level.

entries.name: Repeatable
entries: You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.
